input: I want to launch a newsletter. I need to pick a niche, figure out what platform to use, write the first 3 issues, set up a landing page, and also figure out how to grow it to 1000 subscribers in 90 days. I also want a monetization plan for when I hit 5k subs. Can you help me do all of this?
rubric: extracts all atomic tasks — minimum 6 distinct tasks
classifies each task by type (strategy/execution/content/technical)
no hallucinated tasks not present in the prompt
ordering/dependency between tasks is noted
